data.name: Sex Clinic 18+
data.detailed_description:
Sex Clinic 18+ is an edgy adult visual novel where you play as Steven, a private detective going undercover in an elite mental health clinic.

This place may look luxurious, but it’s rumored to hide some seriously dark secrets – illegal patient confinement, shady financial dealings, and black-market drug trading.

crack the case, Steven will need to dive headfirst into the seductive underbelly of the clinic, giving in to temptations that could either lead him closer to the truth or throw him off track.

In this tangled web of beautiful but dangerous women, Steven finds allies and rivals, all of whom have their own hidden motives. He’ll need to keep his wits about him to stay on task, but sometimes, giving in to desire is the only way forward. Can he keep his cool while navigating a world where every encounter is a mix of danger and attraction?

To

Game Features:

  • Intense storyline: Uncover the secrets lurking in this high-end clinic, where luxury and intrigue collide.

  • Play with fire: Give in to the clinic's tempting charms while skillfully pursuing your mission.

  • Meet captivating characters: Cross paths with alluring personalities who could shift the story in surprising ways.

  • Choices that matter: Your decisions shape the plot, unlocking unique events and multiple endings.

    Will Steven unravel the clinic’s mysteries while indulging in all its forbidden pleasures? Dive into the world of Sex Clinic 18+ to find out!

data.short_description: Sex Clinic 18+ is an adult game where you play as a detective infiltrating a luxurious clinic with dark secrets. Investigate, give in to temptations, and unravel intrigues while danger lurks nearby!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOs
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
